name: Tenable Attack Surface Management
description: External attack surface management providing continuous discovery and assessment of internet-facing assets, domain monitoring, and exposure risk analysis

actions.name: List Inventory Assets
actions.description: Retrieve all discovered assets in the attack surface inventory with filtering and pagination

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filter criteria for narrowing results (e.g., by asset type, risk level)

parameters.name: columns
parameters.description: Specific columns to include in the response

actions.name: Get Asset Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific asset including technologies, services, and risk factors

parameters.name: asset_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the asset

actions.name: Search Domains
actions.description: Search for domains and subdomains discovered in the attack surface

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filter with asset_type=domain and optional domain name search

actions.name: List Findings
actions.description: Retrieve security findings and exposures across the attack surface

actions.name: Get Risk Score
actions.description: Retrieve the organization's attack surface risk score and trend data

actions.name: List Seeds
actions.description: Retrieve the list of seed domains and IP ranges used for attack surface discovery

actions.name: Add Seed
actions.description: Add a new seed domain or IP range to expand attack surface discovery
